steps.assistant_content_head:
I'll create a responsive team directory page for 'Chroma Collective' according to the specifications.

First, I'll write the HTML file with inline CSS and JavaScript:

tool_calls.content_head:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Meet the Visionaries - Chroma Collective</title

steps.assistant_content_head: Now I'll render the HTML page to a PNG using a headless browser to verify it meets the specifications:
